title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed with any model served by Ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat models in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; no API keys needed, runs entirely locally.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; interact with local LLMs from JVM applications.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting and model switching.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by Ollama; local code completions and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented-Generation stack using Ollama, Sentence-Transformers and Chroma.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes using Ollama.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language client for Ollama; simple API to chat and generate text.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package to integrate Ollama LLMs into mobile and desktop apps.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models and async streaming.
